pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties from Java 8 to Java 17 to enforce compilation for the new JDK.
Upgrade Spring Framework from 5.x to 6.1.2, which requires Java 17 and Jakarta EE 9+ (javax.* to jakarta.* migration).
Upgrade Servlet API to version 6.0.0 to align with Jakarta EE 9+ requirements for Spring 6 and Java 17.
Upgrade Tomcat to 10.1.17 to support Jakarta EE 9+ and Java 17.
Upgrade Undertow to 2.3.10.Final to support Jakarta EE 9+ and Java 17.
Upgrade Jetty to 11.0.19 to support Jakarta EE 9+ and Java 17.
Upgrade Mockito to 5.8.0, which requires Java 11+ and aligns with the new JDK target.
Upgrade JUnit Jupiter and Platform to 5.10.0 to ensure compatibility with modern test runners on Java 17.
Upgrade Jackson to 2.16.1 for security patches and modern Java support.
Upgrade Byte Buddy to 1.14.11 to support Java 17 class file structures.
Upgrade SLF4J to 2.0.9 to align with modern logging frameworks and Java 17.
Upgrade Logback to 1.4.14 to align with SLF4J 2.0 and Java 17.
Add Google Truth as a new testing dependency.
Refactor project groupId, artifactId, and packaging to reflect a parent POM structure.
Update various Maven plugins (compiler, surefire, jacoco, etc.) to versions compatible with Java 17 and modern Maven.
Remove deprecated or legacy dependencies like JUnit 4, old Jackson ASL, and Springfox.

.gitignore.general_idea: Add IntelliJ IDEA configuration directory to gitignore to prevent IDE-specific files from being tracked.

README.md.general_idea: Update README documentation to reflect the migration from JUnit 4 Rule-based setup to JUnit 5 Extension-based setup.
README.md.human_impl: Replace `@Rule public RestServiceRule` with `@ExtendWith(MockitoSpringEndpointExtension.class)` and `@MockEndpoint` annotations in usage examples.

README.md.general_idea: Update dependency configuration examples to use the new modular artifact IDs for JUnit 4 and JUnit 5.
Update the version history section to include the latest release notes.
README.md.human_impl: Add entries for versions 1.1.0 and 1.0.3, and update the release link to point to 1.0.3.

README.md.general_idea: Refine the project description and benefits list to better highlight integration-style unit testing and Mockito support.
README.md.human_impl: Rewrite the introductory paragraph and bullet points to emphasize 'full-stack integration-style unit testing' and 'Mockito support'.

README.md.general_idea: Add instructions on how to configure the client to use the random port assigned by the mock server.
README.md.human_impl: Add a 'Client configuration' section explaining the `mockitoRestSpringServerPort` system property.
